chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1255 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of CMA No.5756/2025 04.12.2025 Mr. Mujtaba Shahid, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Naeem Kalwar, advocate holds brief for Mr. Zain A. Soomro, advocate for the respondent Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG --------- Vide order dated 30.12.2024, IGP Sindh was directed to investigate the allegations of the petitioner against the police officials and private respondents. Pursuant to the said orders, AIGP was appointed as inquiry officer. During course of the inquiry, the petitioner himself appeared before the inquiry officer and submitted his affidavit withdrawing his complaint vide report dated 09.1.2025 and such report was filed before this Court which was not accepted and vide order dated 04.02.2025 IGP Sindh was directed to conduct a fresh inquiry. Pursuant to said orders, inquiry report has been filed and departmental proceedings were initiated against the delinquent officials and on completion of the said proceedings major penalty of forfeiture of approved service of one year was imposed upon the said officer. Since the orders passed by this Court have been complied with, therefore, instant application having served its purpose is dismissed. As far as the question of allegations is concerned, he may avail remedy before the appropriate forum in accordance with law. JUDGE Nadir*
